Appearances:
Plaintiff Portola-Glenview LLC is present. Represented by.
Attorney Nils Rosenquest for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kourney Wilson is present.
Attorney Leila Knox appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of NOV-21-2016 is vacated. (501)
